n: Book 4, Chapter 2: Too Far From the City

steps.t: Prince Imrahil has dismounted from his steed just inside the gates of Minas Tirith, on the western end of the Pelennor Fields. You helped save Faramir…
Gandalf can be found just within the gates to Minas Tirith. Faramir has suffered an unnatural wound during the retreat from the Causeway Forts, and Ga…
